description: PLACEHOLDER character preset - a heroic knight. Swap 'ckpt_name' in example_hero.workflow.json for a checkpoint you actually have installed, and rewrite the prompt_template below to match the character you actually want, before real use.

prompt_template.template: a heroic knight in silver plate armor, detailed digital painting, character portrait, {pose}, {expression} expression

pose.description: The pose or action the character should be shown in.
pose.default: standing confidently, hand on sword hilt

seed.description: Random seed for reproducibility. Omit to get a different image each generation.
